text:
MISG_ENRLMT_TYPE_IND_11 

MISG_ENRLMT_TYPE_IND_12 

LABEL: Missing Enrollment Type Code in Monthly Beneficiary Summary File — January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that the person had only unknown enrollment in the month. There are separate 
variables for each of the 12 months during the year. 

SHORT NAME: MISG_ENRLMT_TYPE_IND_01 
MISG_ENRLMT_TYPE_IND_02 
MISG_ENRLMT_TYPE_IND_03 
MISG_ENRLMT_TYPE_IND_04 
MISG_ENRLMT_TYPE_IND_05 
MISG_ENRLMT_TYPE_IND_06
